title: BEM-845 response writer
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='
'
for d in ['scripts','.github/workflows','governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 19:02 (UTC+3)'
# Add a verifier script that does not fake Claude response; it only records proof/failure.
verifier=Path('scripts/verify_real_claude_response.py')
verifier.write_text('''#!/usr/bin/env python3
import json
from datetime import datetime, timedelta, timezone
from pathlib import Path
SEP="\n"
KYIV=timezone(timedelta(hours=3))
now=datetime.now(KYIV).strftime("%Y-%m-%d | %H:%M (UTC+3)")
mail=Path("governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt")
state=Path("governance/state/real_claude_response_verification_state.json")
real=[]
blockers=[]
if mail.exists():
    for p in sorted(mail.glob("*")):
        if not p.is_file():
            continue
        txt=p.read_text(encoding="utf-8", errors="ignore")
        up=txt.upper()
        low=(p.name+" "+txt).lower()
        bad="NOT CLAUDE APPROVAL" in up or "RUNTIME BLOCKER" in up or "not treat this as claude" in low
        ok=("CLAUDE RESPONSE" in up and "DECISION:" in up and ("APPROVED" in up or "CHANGE_REQUIRED" in up or "BLOCKED" in up))
        item={"path":str(p),"size":len(txt)}
        if bad:
            blockers.append(item)
        elif ok:
            real.append(item)
data={"schema_version":"real_claude_response_verification_state.v1","status":"real_response_found" if real else "real_response_missing","checked_at":now,"real_responses":real[-20:],"blocker_files":blockers[-20:],"operator_role":"none"}
state.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
state.write_text(json.dumps(data,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+SEP,encoding="utf-8")
print(json.dumps(data,ensure_ascii=False))
if not real:
    raise SystemExit(2)
''')
wf=Path('.github/workflows/claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml')
text=wf.read_text(errors='ignore') if wf.exists() else ''
old='''            Write response to governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/ with BEM id in filename.
            Include Decision: APPROVED / CHANGE_REQUIRED / BLOCKED when asked.
            Explain why prior mailbox response was missing when asked.
            Do not write issue comments. Do not expose secrets.
'''
new='''            Write a real Claude response file to governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/.
            The filename must contain the current BEM id and the phrase claude_response.
            The file must start with: CLAUDE RESPONSE
            The file must contain exactly one line starting with: Decision: APPROVED / CHANGE_REQUIRED / BLOCKED
            Do not write runtime blocker files as a substitute for your response.
            Explain why prior mailbox response was missing when asked.
            Do not write issue comments. Do not expose secrets.
'''
changed_prompt=False
if old in text:
    text=text.replace(old,new)
    changed_prompt=True
elif 'The file must start with: CLAUDE RESPONSE' not in text and 'Write response to governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/' in text:
    text=text.replace('Write response to governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/ with BEM id in filename.','Write a real Claude response file to governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/. The file must start with: CLAUDE RESPONSE and include Decision: APPROVED / CHANGE_REQUIRED / BLOCKED.')
    changed_prompt=True
# Add verifier after Claude response step if absent.
if 'scripts/verify_real_claude_response.py' not in text:
    anchor='''      - name: Record dispatcher completion
        if: steps.active_check.outputs.active == 'true' && always()
'''
    insert='''      - name: Verify real Claude response
        if: steps.active_check.outputs.active == 'true' && always()
        continue-on-error: true
        run: python3 scripts/verify_real_claude_response.py
'''
    if anchor in text:
        text=text.replace(anchor,insert+anchor,1)
    else:
        text=text+sep+insert
wf.write_text(text)
state={'bem':'BEM-845','status':'claude_response_writer_contract_patched','workflow_exists':wf.exists(),'prompt_changed':changed_prompt,'verifier':str(verifier),'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem845_patch_claude_response_writer_contract.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem845_patch_claude_response_writer_contract.md').write_text('# BEM-845 | Patch Claude Response Writer Contract | PASS'+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem845_next.md').write_text('Next: dispatch Claude dispatcher and verify real Claude response marker. Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-845'+sep+sep+'Claude response writer contract patched. Next: dispatch and verify real response.'+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend([str(verifier),str(wf),'governance/state/bem845_patch_claude_response_writer_contract.json','governance/reports/bem845_patch_claude_response_writer_contract.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem845_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Patched Claude dispatcher prompt to require CLAUDE RESPONSE marker and added verifier that records missing/real response without faking approval')
"""
No issue comments.
